events.text: Assessed the missing water meter bonding jumper as a **fail** (high risk) — it's a direct NEC 250.104(A) violation since meters/filters that may be disconnected require a bonding jumper to maintain continuity of the water piping bonding path. Wrote the full findings, corrective actions, and rationale to `/app/answer.json`.
